scripts.build: npm run build:all && npm run build:electron
scripts.build:all: npm run build:rust && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:main
scripts.build:rust: cd ../native_utils/source_page_search_by_title/source_page_search_by_title_code && cargo build --release && cd ../../fast_git_ops/fast_git_ops_code && cargo build --release && cd ../../working_graph/working_graph_code && cargo build --release
scripts.build:frontend: cd ../frontend && npm run build && npm run build:server
scripts.fix-backend: mkdir -p build/mac/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/backend && cp -r ../backend/dist/backend/* build/mac/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/backend/ && cp ../backend/package.json build/mac/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/backend/ && cp -r ../backend/node_modules build/mac/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/backend/ && cp -r ../backend/dist/shared_code build/mac/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/shared_code && cp -r ../backend/src/html/templates build/mac/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/backend/src/html/templates && cp -r ../backend/src/html/shared build/mac/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/backend/src/html/shared && cp -r ../backend/src/html/presets build/mac/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/backend/src/html/presets && cp node-wrapper.sh build/mac/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/node-wrapper.sh && chmod +x build/mac/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/node-wrapper.sh && chmod +x build/mac/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/node && mkdir -p build/mac-arm64/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/backend && cp -r ../backend/dist/backend/* build/mac-arm64/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/backend/ && cp ../backend/package.json build/mac-arm64/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/backend/ && cp -r ../backend/node_modules build/mac-arm64/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/backend/ && cp -r ../backend/dist/shared_code build/mac-arm64/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/shared_code && cp -r ../backend/src/html/templates build/mac-arm64/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/backend/src/html/templates && cp -r ../backend/src/html/shared build/mac-arm64/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/backend/src/html/shared && cp -r ../backend/src/html/presets build/mac-arm64/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/backend/src/html/presets && cp node-wrapper.sh build/mac-arm64/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/node-wrapper.sh && chmod +x build/mac-arm64/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/node-wrapper.sh && chmod +x build/mac-arm64/Meadow.app/Contents/Resources/node
